places.name: Museum of the Weird
places.description: Continuing the tradition of the dime museum in style.

places.name: Cathedral of Junk
places.description: This unique structure in suburban Austin is made up entirely of other people's castaways, and constantly changing.

places.name: Uncommon Objects
places.description: One part antique store, one part curiosities hodge-podge.

places.name: Congress Bridge Bats
places.description: Home to the largest urban bat colony in North America, estimated at 1.5 million bats.

places.name: Museum of Natural and Artificial Ephemerata
Toy Joy
places.description: A store full of vintage and indie toys designed to bring out the kid in even the crustiest of adults.

places.name: Mayfield Park
places.description: Free public park and gardens filled with peacocks and peahens.

places.name: Casa Neverlandia
places.description: This eclectic, mosaic-clad home includes a bamboo ping-pong loft and a "Whispermaphones" intercom.
